title: delete: support OCI images
body:
...implicitely by updating containers/image.

Fixes: #667
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: Now with vendoring c/image instead of my fork.
Eventually, please re-vendor on top of https://github.com/containers/image/pull/647 .

@mtrmac rebased and updated. Don't get tricked by `go.mod` referencing `v1.5.2-0.20190620105408-93b1deece293` ... the commit is **after** v2.0.0 but go has a bug there. @saschagrunert opened an issue or PR a while ago at golang to get that fixed.

> Don't get tricked by `go.mod` referencing `v1.5.2-0.20190620105408-93b1deece293` ... the commit is **after** v2.0.0 but go has a bug there. @saschagrunert opened an issue or PR a while ago at golang to get that fixed.

Ah, I did notice that in other situations, but I didn’t look into it. Great to hear that this will be fixed.
